metadata.description: Public multi-agent skills marketplace for Claude Code, Codex, and future coding agents

plugins.name: how-plugins-work
plugins.description: Explains plugin naming, skill resolution, Claude/Codex adapter sync, marketplace aliases, runtime caches, and the plugin:skill invocation pattern in practice. During the l'Aicluse migration it records how @leclause and @laicluse-agent-tools coexist, and ships a local test-before-push workflow for both Claude and Codex.

plugins.name: git-discipline
plugins.description: Multi-agent git discipline bundle: reusable commit/rebase/merge skills, repo-aware push policy, Claude PreToolUse guards, Codex-ready skill adapters, and git-native hooks for direct CLI commits.
